fixedTexts:
Re-watch onboarding
Replay any onboarding step. Your real account, devices and earnings remain unchanged.
1 · Welcome
The 'Your phone, your AI cluster' intro
2 · Earnings estimator
Reads your NPU specs and projects daily earnings
3 · Activate mobile compute
Three-phase: opt-in → waiting → first job
Lifecycle demo
Seed legacy devices and fast-forward time so the degradation curve and trade-in flow are visible immediately.
Add demo legacy NexionBox-S1
5 months ago · efficiency ~70% on arrival
Seed S1
Add demo legacy NexionRack-P1
8 months ago · efficiency ~50%
Seed Rack
Fast-forward all hardware
Roll every degradable device's purchase date back 3 months
+3 months
Trigger earnings milestone
Reset fired milestones + bump lifetime earnings past $100 to replay the celebration cascade
Fire
Cycle platform phase
Pin platform phase P1 → P6 → unpin. Current: —
Pin
Trigger Nova cadence push
Force-fire monthly task-lock push + trade-in nudge (bypasses cooldown). Copy adapts to current phase.
Push now
Reset to phone-only
Restore the initial onboarding fleet (phone × 1)
Reset
Trial config(后台可控)
真后台:GET/PUT /api/admin/trial/config。当前 trial 状态:idle
